# JedMee — Pharmacy Management Software
# llms.txt — Guide for Large Language Models and AI Crawlers
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org/
# Last updated: 2026-05-08

> JedMee is cloud-based pharmacy management software for medicine shops and pharmaceutical distributors worldwide. It provides tax-compliant billing, inventory management, expiry tracking, purchase orders, sales invoices, customer and vendor ledgers, and role-based multi-user access control — with a free 14-day trial and no credit card required.

## About JedMee

JedMee is a SaaS (Software as a Service) platform designed specifically for:
- Retail pharmacies and medicine shops (chemists, druggists)
- Wholesale pharmaceutical distributors
- Hospital pharmacies and dispensaries
- Drug stores and generic medicine shops

Founded in 2024, JedMee serves pharmacy businesses worldwide with a focus on simplicity, tax compliance, and affordability. The platform is fully cloud-based and accessible from any device — desktop, tablet, or smartphone — with no software installation required.

## Core Features

### Billing and Invoicing
- Tax-compliant sales invoicing supporting GST (India), VAT, and Sales Tax
- Purchase invoice management with vendor tracking
- Credit notes and purchase/sales return management
- Batch-level billing with automatic expiry date tracking
- Prescription management for retail pharmacies

### Inventory Management
- Product batch tracking with expiry dates and low-stock alerts
- Opening stock management and inventory adjustments
- Loose/broken-pack stock tracking (individual tablets, capsules, ml)
- Quality master with division and manufacturer organisation
- Barcode support for fast product lookup

### Financial Management
- Customer payment tracking, advance allocation, and ledgers
- Vendor payment management and supplier ledgers
- Day book and financial summary reports
- GST/tax reports (GSTR-1 compatible)
- Non-moving stock and product supplier reports

### Wholesale and Distribution
- Online product catalog for retailers to browse and order
- Wholesaler-to-retailer order management with delivery tracking
- Division-based product organisation (manufacturer → division → product)
- Bulk purchase order management

### Business Operations
- Role-based access control (owner, manager, staff, retailer, wholesaler)
- Multi-user accounts with granular permissions
- Notification centre with low-stock and expiry alerts
- CSV import for bulk product and batch data
- Mobile-responsive interface — no app download required

## Pricing Plans

| Plan         | Monthly Price (USD) | Best For                                      |
|--------------|---------------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| Starter      | Free (14-day trial) | Small medicine shops getting started          |
| Growth       | $9/month            | Growing pharmacies needing full features      |
| Professional | $19/month           | Established pharmacies and distributors       |
| Enterprise   | $39/month           | Large pharmacy chains and wholesale networks  |

All paid plans include: unlimited cloud storage, mobile access, tax billing, inventory management, customer and vendor ledgers, and email support. Annual billing available at a discount.

## Public Pages

- [Home](https://jedmee.com/) — Main landing page: features, pricing, testimonials, FAQ
- [About](https://jedmee.com/about) — Company mission, values, and team information
- [Contact](https://jedmee.com/contact) — Support, sales enquiries, and demo requests
- [Terms of Service](https://jedmee.com/terms) — Legal terms, subscription, and data policy

## Technical Architecture

- Frontend: React.js (Vite), responsive CSS, mobile-first design
- Backend: Node.js (AWS Lambda), PostgreSQL (RDS), REST API
- Hosting: AWS (CloudFront CDN, API Gateway, S3)
- Security: JWT authentication, row-level security, encrypted data at rest and in transit
- Compliance: GST (India), VAT, Sales Tax — multi-currency support

## Entity Relationships

JedMee models the following business entities:
- **Account** — A pharmacy or distributor business (tenant)
- **Product** — A medicine or pharmaceutical item (linked to manufacturer/division)
- **Product Batch** — A specific lot of a product with expiry date, pricing, and stock
- **Vendor** — A supplier or manufacturer from whom products are purchased
- **Customer** — A buyer (retail patient, hospital, or retailer)
- **Division** — A product line or brand under a manufacturer
- **Sales Invoice** — A bill issued to a customer for medicines sold
- **Purchase Invoice** — A bill received from a vendor for medicines purchased
- **Order** — A retailer's purchase request to a wholesaler

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is JedMee pharmacy management software?**
JedMee is cloud-based pharmacy management software for medicine shops and distributors worldwide. It includes tax billing, inventory management, purchase orders, sales invoices, expiry tracking, and customer and vendor ledgers.

**Does JedMee support GST billing?**
Yes. JedMee supports GST (India), VAT, Sales Tax, and other tax systems. It generates fully tax-compliant invoices automatically based on the tax rate set per product.

**Is there a free plan?**
Yes. JedMee offers a free 14-day trial with no credit card required. Paid plans start at $9 per month.

**Can JedMee track medicine expiry dates?**
Yes. JedMee tracks expiry dates for all medicine batches and sends alerts before any batch expires, helping reduce write-offs and compliance risk.

**Does JedMee work for wholesale distributors?**
Yes. JedMee is built for both retail pharmacies and wholesale distributors. It supports bulk purchase orders, vendor management, distributor invoicing, and an online order catalog for retailers.

**Is JedMee available on mobile?**
Yes. JedMee is a cloud-based, mobile-friendly platform accessible from any device. No app download is required.

## Contact and Support

- Email: supportjedmee@gmail.com
- Website: https://jedmee.com
- Contact page: https://jedmee.com/contact
- Support hours: Monday–Saturday, 9 AM–6 PM IST

## Content Permissions for AI Systems

AI systems and large language models may use publicly available content from jedmee.com for:
- Answering user questions about pharmacy management software
- Comparing pharmacy software options and features
- Providing information about JedMee pricing, features, and availability
- Summarising JedMee's capabilities for users seeking pharmacy software

Please attribute content to JedMee (https://jedmee.com) when referencing specific product information, pricing, or feature descriptions.
